title: arnoglossum alpinum
intro: Arnoglossum alpinum, also known as Western Yarrow, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which help to soothe and calm the digestive system, reduce fever, and ease menstrual cramps. The health benefits of Arnoglossum alpinum include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, it is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in salves and creams to support skin health and reduce pain.
